items.briefing:
A newly discovered attack called "SearchLeak" targets Microsoft Copilot, allowing attackers to steal data with a single click. If your organisation uses Microsoft 365 or Copilot tools, be cautious about clicking unexpected links or prompts within those platforms. Separately, research highlights how easily Reddit content can be manipulated to influence AI-powered search results — meaning information gathered through AI research tools may not always be reliable.

**Practical tip:** When using AI tools for research or decision-making, cross-check important information against trusted, authoritative sources rather than relying solely on AI-generated summaries.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's cyber security strategy enters phase two, setting national direction for critical infrastructure protection.
